body.title: DickSimnel: gate on OR balance — prefer free-tier Gemini/Ollama models for worker-class work
body.result: google-free worker routing rule added; OR balance floor () in _poll_and_work(); 5 tests
body.description:
**Problem:** OR balance is declining despite free Google Gemini and Ollama being available. DickSimnel and Igor both route through OR for inference, but worker-tier work (S/M tickets, analysis) doesn't need paid Sonnet — free Gemini Flash or cheap Ollama models are adequate.

**What to build:** In InferenceGateway or DickSimnelDevice, route worker-class tasks to Gemini-free or Ollama-via-OR when OR balance is below a threshold. Only use paid Sonnet for HIGH-inertia or escalation-path tickets.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/device.py or devices/inference/device.py (model routing), possibly devices/igor/cognition/cloud_mode.py
**Design rules:** Budget gate is external state — readable without Postgres
**Scope boundary:** Model routing for worker-class tasks. Leave CC's model routing alone.
**Completion criteria:** DickSimnel uses free-tier model by default; falls back to paid Sonnet only when free tier fails or ticket has HIGH-inertia tag. OR balance stops declining during idle DickSimnel operation.
